findings.title: Required field has no required indicator
findings.message: The `Notification email` label has no asterisk, no "(required)" text, and the input has no `aria-required="true"` — yet the validator treats an empty value as invalid. Sighted users have no visible cue, and assistive tech doesn't get the programmatic signal. Add a visible `*` (with a corresponding legend, e.g. "* indicates a required field") and `aria-required="true"` on the input.

findings.title: Error message not linked to input via aria-describedby
findings.message:
When the validator fires, the `

` is rendered alongside the input but isn't associated with it programmatically. Screen reader users will hear the input's name but never the error. Give the error `

` an `id` (e.g. `notificationEmailError`) and add `aria-describedby="notificationEmailError"` plus `aria-invalid="true"` (bound to `notificationEmailIsInvalid`) on the input.
